home.title: Shastra Vidya Sthanam
home.subtitle: Shri Chandrashekharendra Saraswati Shaastra Vidya Sthaanam
home.heroDescription: An institution of excellence organized and supported by the Prof. S Soundararajan Public Charitable Trust. Dedicated to preserving the traditional teaching processes for Shastric studies.

about.title: About Us
about.mission: To continue the traditional teaching processes for Shastric studies among deserving students who have demonstrated inclination towards the study of the Veda and its attendant literature.
about.vision: Establishing a center for excellence for Shastric studies guided by Mahamahopadhyaya Brahmashri Acharya Mani Dravid Shastri, based on the ideals and directions of Mahaperiyaval.
about.history: Mahaperiyaval during his earlier days had discussed with Prof. Soundararajan specific ideals related to starting of a University for Shastric studies. His Holiness wanted the traditional method of teaching the Shastras to be preserved.
about.founder: The Trust is set up in memory of Prof S Soundarrajan and is inspired by his ideals and motivations. Prof. Soundararajan and his wife Smt Jambakavalli had been deeply inspired by the ideals and teachings of Mahaperiyaval, Shri Chandrashekharendra Saraswati Swami. Prof. Soundararajan was also an ardent student of Sanskrit and was inclined towards the study of Shaastric literature.
